Went through 40 links today. Here's what made the brief:

1. Routing rules now available on AI Gateway
   This turns model fallback and model policy into a gateway config problem instead of an application redeploy.

2. Lakebase Search: vector and BM25 on Neon
   A serious attempt to keep hybrid retrieval inside Postgres while addressing scale-to-zero and object-storage constraints.

3. Changelog - July 2, 2026
   Multiple concrete workflow and cost changes in one platform update, especially for MCP/agent usage.
